hypothesis: If the integrated workflow correctly balances thermodynamic feasibility with commercial cost data for Ca2SiO4 synthesis in the Ca–Si–O–C–N–H–Al–B space at 800–1600°C, then the top-ranked synthesis recipe among 261 candidates using 36 commercially available reactants will be thermodynamically favorable and cost-optimized, minimizing the combined thermodynamic penalty and reactant price.
